revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: ʼ<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- <templatedata> { "params": {}, "description": "Use this template to insert the character commonly used to represent the glottal stop (or hamza) in Semitic languages, or the orthographic glottal stop in Latin-based alphabets.\nThat character has the code U+02BC, Modifier Letter Apostrophe.\nDO NOT SUPPLY ANY PARAMETERS." } </templatedata> --></noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: ʼ<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- <templatedata> { "params": {}, "description": "Use this template to insert the character commonly used to represent the glottal stop (or hamza) in Semitic languages, or the orthographic glottal stop in Latin-based alphabets.\nThat character has the code U+02BC, Modifier Letter Apostrophe.\nDO NOT SUPPLY ANY PARAMETERS." } </templatedata> --></noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23417362209|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: ʼ<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- <templatedata> { "params": {}, "description": "Use this template to insert the character commonly used to represent the glottal stop (or hamza) in Semitic languages, or the orthographic glottal stop in Latin-based alphabets.\nThat character has the code U+02BC, Modifier Letter Apostrophe.\nDO NOT SUPPLY ANY PARAMETERS." } </templatedata> --></noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

ʼ<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- <templatedata> { "params": {}, "description": "Use this template to insert the character commonly used to represent the glottal stop (or hamza) in Semitic languages, or the orthographic glottal stop in Latin-based alphabets.\nThat character has the code U+02BC, Modifier Letter Apostrophe.\nDO NOT SUPPLY ANY PARAMETERS." } </templatedata> --> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Hamza here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Hamza for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> ʼ<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- <templatedata> { "params": {}, "description": "Use this template to insert the character commonly used to represent the glottal stop (or hamza) in Semitic languages, or the orthographic glottal stop in Latin-based alphabets.\nThat character has the code U+02BC, Modifier Letter Apostrophe.\nDO NOT SUPPLY ANY PARAMETERS." } </templatedata> --> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24938264069|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Hamza for full history.
